title: Macron says France is sending its aircraft carrier to the Mediterranean
author: FRANCE24
fullText:

 This photograph shows screens broadcasting French President Emmanuel Macron's address on the war in Iran and its repercussions in the Middle East, from the Elysee Palace in Paris on March 3, 2026. © Sébastien Bozon, AFP 
 
07:37 
 
 
 
 
 Issued on: 03/03/2026 - 20:35
summary: ⁠French President ​Emmanuel Macron has ​ordered aircraft carrier Charles de Gaulle, its air assets, ​and ‌its frigate ⁠escort to set ‌sail for the Mediterranean following the ⁠situation in the Middle East, he ​said on ‌Tuesday in an address to the nation.
